svg.aria-label: Interactive comparison of learning-rate schedules: a grey cosine curve whose horizon is fixed at step zero, and a teal Warmup-Stable-Decay curve holding a stable plateau with a draggable trigger point that sets where the decay begins. A readout reports the trigger as a percentage of the run.
svg.text: cosine — horizon fixed at step zero, already spent
decay triggered at 72% of the plotted run
